data.body: a263 GREEN: new test_push_parent_exit.py — real subprocess rebar create with REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=async + git shim on PATH that blocks only on 'git push'. Crux (non-vacuous): parent create exits 0 promptly while detached push child is blocked mid-push and origin/tickets has NOT advanced; after release, exact created ticket id lands on origin tickets tree. POSIX-guarded. Committing stacked on f476.
